query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalPages,
  processingStatus,
  SUM(CASE WHEN generatedImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagesWithImages,
  SUM(CASE WHEN errorMessage IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagesWithErrors
FROM pages
GROUP BY processingStatus;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25wxbLc1qt11VMj.9969a19f9b56 --database ekExVqzU44AWdbtAiFfyD8 --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalPages,
  processingStatus,
  SUM(CASE WHEN generatedImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagesWithImages,
  SUM(CASE WHEN errorMessage IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagesWithErrors
FROM pages
GROUP BY processingStatus;
